response.justification: The candidate exceeds the 15-year engineering requirement with recent, relevant experience in AI infrastructure and developer tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires director-level expertise with recognized AI strategy credentials and demonstrated AI products or platforms. The candidate's AI background is recent (started April 2025) and appears implementation-focused rather than strategic, lacks the preferred advanced degree in AI, and current Staff-level title raises questions about principal-level readiness.
strengths: Twenty years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure with demonstrated ability to build and scale
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP protocol at a technical company, showing alignment with cutting-edge AI platform development
Strong track record of technical mentorship and knowledge sharing through workshops, talks, and teaching initiatives
concerns: AI expertise is recent (less than two years) and infrastructure-focused rather than demonstrating strategic AI vision or independent product innovation
No Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML field (preferred), and no evidence of recognized independent AI products or platforms developed
Current Staff-level title and resume showing implementation expertise rather than director-level strategic leadership in AI domain

key_factors.factor: Recent AI infrastructure focus without demonstrated strategic expertise or products
Twenty years of proven engineering experience and ability to build at scale
Missing advanced degree in AI/ML (preferred qualification)
